info.description: Client reviews shown on retreat, workshop, coaching and programme pages. Mix of text quotes and short videos.

quote.description: The review text. Required if no video. Keep tight — 1-3 sentences reads best.

rating.description: Optional 1-5 star rating. Leave blank to hide stars.

photo.description: Optional portrait photo of the client. Shown as a circular/octagonal frame next to the quote on the /testimonials page. Best size 800×800 (square), JPEG, max 500 KB.

video.description: Optional uploaded video testimonial (MP4, under 90 seconds recommended).

video_thumbnail.description: Optional poster image shown before the video plays.

youtube_url.description: Optional — paste a YouTube video URL to embed instead of uploading. Either this or 'video' (not both). Accepts standard youtube.com/watch?v=... or youtu.be/... links.

display_style.description: How this testimonial renders on the dedicated /testimonials page. 'card' = standard 3-column grid item. 'banner' = full-width prominent block between rows (use for your strongest testimonials, 1 in every 6-10 entries).

date.description: When the review was given (sort by recency).

tags.description: Page tag — used when a review applies to a section page rather than a specific experience.

experiences.description: Specific retreats/workshops this review belongs to. Leave blank if it's a general coaching review (use the tag instead).

is_featured.description: Show on the homepage testimonial strip.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers appear first. Use to surface strongest reviews.
